title: Core image downloading logic is still missing (Iteration 4)
description: Previous finding F-0001 stated that core image downloading logic is missing. Despite multiple review iterations (this is the 4th), the provided code still only focuses on the management, cleaning, and passing of `StoredImageAttachment` and `ImageAttachmentStore` within the interactive and task execution modes. There is still absolutely no implementation for extracting image URLs from `PrReviewData` (body, comments, reviews) or downloading those images from GitHub. The primary requirement of the user request is completely ignored.
suggestion: Implement the logic to extract image URLs from `PrReviewData` and a service to download these images using GitHub authentication (e.g., `gh api` or authenticated requests) to save them as `StoredImageAttachment`.

title: Core image downloading logic is implemented
description: The core image downloading logic is now fully implemented. `src/features/tasks/prReviewImageAttachments.ts` contains `extractImageUrlsFromText` for URL extraction and `downloadImage` for authenticated fetching via `gh auth token`, including magic bytes and size validation. This directly addresses the requirement and resolves the previous finding F-0001.
